hero.title: Premium Grooming Experience
hero.subtitle: Where tradition meets modern style. Experience the art of classic barbering with a contemporary twist.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Expert grooming services tailored to the modern gentleman

items.title: Classic Haircut
items.description: Traditional cut with hot towel and neck shave

items.title: Hot Towel Shave
items.description: Luxurious straight razor shave with hot towels

items.title: The Works
items.description: Haircut, beard trim, and hot towel treatment

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded in 1995, Classic Cuts Barbershop has been serving the community with exceptional grooming services for nearly three decades. Our master barbers combine time-honored techniques with modern styles to give you the perfect look.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.content: We believe every man deserves to look and feel his best. Our team is dedicated to providing personalized service in a welcoming atmosphere. We use only premium products and take pride in our craft.

contact.title: Book an Appointment
contact.subtitle: Walk-ins welcome, but appointments are recommended to skip the wait.
